message:
feat: use writeRetryTx for Dolt serialization errors (fix-merge PR #2855)

Introduces withRetryTx — a transaction-level retry wrapper for Dolt
serialization errors (1213 deadlock / 1205 lock wait timeout). Migrates
all withWriteTx call sites to use it. Removes advisory lock from schema
init (DDL is now idempotent via IF NOT EXISTS). Stripped debug log level
flag that was left in doltserver.go.

Co-Authored-By: Dustin Brown <dustin@dolthub.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -668,7 +668,6 @@ func Start(beadsDir string) (*State, error) {
 		cmd := exec.Command(doltBin, "sql-server", //nolint:gosec // doltBin is resolved from PATH, not user input
 			"-H", cfg.Host,
 			"-P", strconv.Itoa(actualPort),
-			"-l", "debug",
 		)
 		cmd.Dir = doltDir
 		cmd.Stdout = logFile
